acquisition method: gel-based tandem affinity purification coupled to mass spectrometry (TAP-MS)
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 2.5 μl of the alkylation buffer (100 mM iodoacetamide)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 2.5 μl of the alkylation buffer (100 mM iodoacetamide)
cleavage agent: 12.5 ng of Trypsin Gold (Promega) was added to each sample
enrichment method: Affinity purification of R2TP/PFDL reveals interactors
fractionation method: Results of gel-based tandem affinity purification coupled to mass spectrometry (TAP-MS)
fragmentation method: fragmented by collision induced dissociation in the LTQ
instrument: The HPLC system was coupled to a LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled to a LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer through a nano-ESI source
labeling: using quantitative mass spectrometry with stable isotope labelling (SILAC)
reduction reagent: Proteins were reduced by addition of 2.5 μl of the reduction buffer (45 mM DTT)
reduction concentration: Proteins were reduced by addition of 2.5 μl of the reduction buffer (45 mM DTT)
